name: codev
description: Human accountability gates for AI-assisted software development that composes with execution skills.

interface.shortDescription: Human accountability gates for AI-assisted development
interface.longDescription: Use CO-DEV to keep AI-assisted software development aligned with human intent through a lightweight .codev.md state file, shape/gate/drift skills, ceremony weight, execution engine state, and human-owned approval gates. It composes with execution skills while preventing them from bypassing human gates.
defaultPrompt: Start a CO-DEV project with human gates.
Use CO-DEV to keep this implementation aligned with my intent.
